policy.resolution: Owner-specific parameter schemas take precedence. Shared schemas are only for parameters parsed by a shared base class, such as IvPBehavior. Parameters with the same name in different apps or behaviors should be treated as block-specific unless they share the same parser.
policy.diagnostics: Only emit diagnostics for constraints with source-enforced or source-parsed confidence. Do not infer legal values or ranges from examples alone.
policy.unknowns: Use diagnostic=false when source accepts broad/opaque strings, has complex parser behavior, or coerces values instead of rejecting them.

perpetual.notes: The source does not reject non-boolean values; it only sets true for the token true and treats other values as false.

match_region.notes: Diagnostics cover simple standard and abbreviated convex region polygons. Source-supported generated and field/property forms are accepted/skipped until modeled.

ignore_region.notes: Diagnostics cover simple standard and abbreviated convex region polygons. Source-supported generated and field/property forms are accepted/skipped until modeled.

point.notes: Source rejects invalid point strings, but detailed point syntax diagnostics are intentionally deferred.

giveway_bow_dist.notes: The default sentinel disables the option, but configured values must be non-negative.

avoid_submode.notes: Valid values depend on the current avoid_mode, so diagnostics are deferred until dependent enum checks are implemented.

contact_type_required.notes: The source accepts any non-empty string and normalizes it to lower case.

velocity_filter.notes: The source uses a custom VelocityFilter parser; syntax diagnostics are deferred.

contact_type_required.notes: The source forwards non-empty values to the contact filter type parser; string diagnostics are deferred.

collision_depth.notes: Configured values must be positive. Source also depends on whether the IvP domain has depth, which is not checked by this value-only diagnostic.

roc_max_dampen.notes: The default is negative, but configured values must be non-negative.

polygon.notes: Diagnostics cover simple standard and abbreviated convex polygon forms. Source-supported generated and field/property forms are accepted/skipped until modeled.

poly.notes: Alias for polygon. Diagnostics cover simple standard and abbreviated convex polygon forms. Source-supported generated and field/property forms are accepted/skipped until modeled.

allowable_ttc.notes: The behavior calls atof before validation, so non-numeric strings can be coerced to 0 rather than rejected.

rng_flag.notes: The source accepts an optional '<range>' prefix plus a VarDataPair flag; detailed flag diagnostics are deferred.

cpa_flag.notes: The source uses VarDataPair flag parsing; detailed flag diagnostics are deferred.

visual_hints.notes: The source delegates to HintHolder; detailed visual hint diagnostics are deferred.

id.notes: The source accepts a non-whitespace variable-like token and prevents changing it after it has been set.

bearing_point.notes: The source delegates to string2Point; detailed point syntax diagnostics are deferred.

line_pct.notes: The source requires a number and clips configured values to [0,100].

depth.notes: The source requires a number and clips negative values to zero.

peakwidth.notes: The source requires a number and clips negative values to zero.

station_pt.notes: The source parses an XY point; detailed point syntax diagnostics are deferred.

swing_time.notes: The source accepts any number and clips it to [0,60]; the diagnostic only rejects nonnumeric input.

failure_type.notes: The source documents crash, burn, and burn,time forms, but returns true for other values without changing the default crash behavior, so this is not diagnosed yet.

status_suffix.notes: The source prepends an underscore when missing; the diagnostic only rejects whitespace.

mod_trail_range.notes: The source uses atof without isNumber for this modifier; exact diagnostics are deferred.

points.notes: Diagnostics cover empty/start plus simple standard and abbreviated waypoint point-list forms. Source-supported generated and field/property forms are accepted/skipped until modeled.

xpoints.notes: Diagnostics cover empty/start plus simple standard and abbreviated waypoint point-list forms. Source-supported generated and field/property forms are accepted/skipped until modeled. Runtime-only current-count matching is not diagnosed statically.

point.notes: Accepts start, empty, or a parsed XY point; detailed point diagnostics are deferred.

newpt.notes: Adds a parsed XY point; detailed point diagnostics are deferred.

speed.notes: The source clips to the active IvP speed-domain maximum, which is not encoded statically.

currix.notes: The source checks atof(value) >= 0 without isNumber; exact diagnostics are deferred.

use_alt_speed.notes: The source ignores the boolean parser return value, so invalid tokens are accepted without changing state.

stem_hdg.notes: The source accepts any number and normalizes it with angle360.

Run.notes: Run lines contain process name, launch options, and optional MOOS name; detailed diagnostics are deferred.

NewConsole.notes: ANTLER parses NewConsole inside Run options. Standalone NewConsole lines are inventoried for highlighting but not diagnosed yet.

max_appcast_events.notes: The source accepts any numeric value and clips it to [0,50].

deferred.poke: structured variable assignment syntax with string/double coercion

paused.notes: The source treats exact true as true and all other values as false, so this is documented but not diagnosed.

behaviors_concise.notes: The source treats exact true as true and all other values as false, so this is documented but not diagnosed.

deferred.var: Comma-separated MOOS variable list; no scalar type diagnostic yet.

near_breach_thresh.notes: Values outside 0..1 are accepted and clamped by the source.

deferred.thresh: Structured app=<name>,gapthresh=<positive number> syntax; example is source-backed but no structured diagnostic yet.

finish_val.notes: Only non-empty is enforced; no diagnostic until non-empty string validation is user-facing.

deferred.post_mapping: Structured OLD_VAR,NEW_VAR mapping; example is source-backed but no diagnostic yet.

wait.notes: MOOS block parsing uses setDoubleOnString, so negative values are accepted even though command-line wait uses a nonnegative setter.

deferred.condition: LogicBuffer condition syntax; no scalar diagnostic yet.
deferred.pass_condition: LogicBuffer condition syntax; no scalar diagnostic yet.
deferred.fail_condition: LogicBuffer condition syntax; no scalar diagnostic yet.

appcast_height.notes: Accepted as a deprecated alias for infocast_height.

infocast_height.notes: Values are accepted then clipped into the UI range 30..90.

deferred.realmcast_channel: Structured realmcast startup preferences handled by RealmRepo::setOnStartPreferences; no scalar diagnostic yet.
deferred.watch_cluster: Structured watch-cluster configuration handled by RealmRepo::addWatchCluster; no scalar diagnostic yet.

post_des_rudder.notes: Source also rejects the reserved DESIRED_RUDDER name.

post_des_thrust.notes: Source also rejects the reserved DESIRED_THRUST name.

turn_rate.notes: Values outside 0..100 are accepted and clipped by the source.

turn_spd_map_null_speed.notes: Source parser rejects an explicit zero even though the constructor default is zero.

deferred.wormhole: wormhole uses a structured parser; example is source-backed but no scalar diagnostic yet.

time_zero.notes: The local source currently reports a warning for explicit script_start because of an if/else ordering bug, so diagnostics are disabled for this enum.
